So I would look for who has your market. It's the fastest way to grow your business is not to go run more Facebook ads. You want to have a Parthenon. Of course you want to do all those things. But what will differentiate is who owns my market that I can get access to. Who could I get who will endorse me? Who owns my market? Who could I get to I could strategically partner with? If you could find somebody that's got a 10-year track record and you join them and you can bring business to them, it's like me going to work for Jim Rohn. If I got up and done the seminars myself in the beginning, you would never heard of Tony Robbins. But I was, I believe what he had to share. And I realized I'm not yet ready for that position. I could get up and speak and do a good job. But I didn't have his experience. So I want you to experience him. And I did that for seven years. And every seminar attended and wrote notes and took it in and got in my body. And my association with him, I developed all these great relationships. And then when I went through my own event, people said, shit, Tony's amazing. And boom, it took off. So association marketing, all of it though, none of it goes forward unless you can be crystal clear. What is your competitive advantage over others? And you've got to be succinct and clear. And you got to give me some sense of certainty or you're wasting your time. Does that make sense? Give her a hand.
